biodynamic.name: Rivetto
biodynamic.description: Enrico Rivetto farms the Lirano hill biodynamically, fully organic from 2009 and Demeter-certified in 2016, the first estate in the Barolo and Barbaresco zones to gain Demeter status.
biodynamic.tip: The Lirano biodynamic garden is the only Demeter-certified estate in the Barolo zone; ask to walk the polyculture plots between the vines.

biodynamic.name: Ferdinando Principiano
biodynamic.description: Ferdinando Principiano has farmed organically and biodynamically without certification since 2004, using natural preparations and avoiding synthetic chemicals across his Monforte vineyards.
biodynamic.tip: This is practising biodynamics, not Demeter-certified; the whole-cluster, low-sulfite Barolo Ravera shows the savoury house style.

organic.name: G.D. Vajra
organic.address: Piazza della Vite e del Vino 1, frazione Vergne, 12060 Barolo, Italy
organic.description: Pioneers of organic farming since 1971, the Vajra family has had all its Barolo-zone vineyards certified organic since 2019, plus SQNPI and Equalitas accreditations.
organic.tip: The certified-organic Barolo Albe is the house benchmark; the estate sits at Vergne, the highest hamlet of Barolo.

verified.address_quoted: Piazza della Vite e del Vino, 1 - Fraz. Vergne 12060 Barolo

organic.name: Punset
organic.description: Marina Marcarino converted Punset to organic farming in the early 1980s, making it the first certified-organic Barbaresco estate in Italy, with a vegan-friendly, no-animal-products cycle.
organic.tip: A forerunner of certified-organic Barbaresco; the Basarin cru is the estate's reference bottling.

organic.name: Trediberri
organic.description: The Oberto family farms its Berri and Rocche dell'Annunziata vineyards organically, with traditional extended-maceration, large-cask ageing. The wines are certified organic.
organic.tip: An organic La Morra estate that keeps prices fair; the Barolo del Comune di La Morra is the value entry.

natural.name: Cascina delle Rose
natural.address: Strada Rio Sordo 58, loc. Tre Stelle, 12050 Barbaresco, Italy
natural.description: Atop the Tre Stelle cru, the Sobrino brothers farm organically (uncertified), ferment with native yeasts and add sulfites sparingly for a low-intervention, natural Barbaresco.
natural.tip: Native-yeast Barbaresco made with the lightest hand; ask the family to compare Tre Stelle and Rio Sordo at the cellar.

verified.address_quoted: Str. Rio Sordo, 58, loc. Tre Stelle, 12050 Barbaresco

natural.name: Cascina Tavijn
natural.description: Nadia Verrua makes nothing-added natural wine from old-vine Grignolino, Barbera and the rare Ruche, fermenting with wild yeasts in a low-intervention style.
natural.tip: Among Piedmont's purest natural-wine addresses; the old-vine Grignolino is the cult bottle to seek out.

vegan_winemaking.name: Punset
vegan_winemaking.description: Punset uses no animal-derived products anywhere in its growing or cellar cycle, so its certified-organic Barbaresco, Barbera and Arneis are vegan-friendly throughout the range.
vegan_winemaking.tip: The whole Punset range is vegan-friendly; the Neh! Langhe Rosso is the easy everyday introduction.

lowsulfite.name: G.D. Vajra Claré J.C.
lowsulfite.address: Piazza della Vite e del Vino 1, frazione Vergne, 12060 Barolo, Italy
lowsulfite.description: From the certified-organic Vajra estate, the ancestral-method Claré J.C. Nebbiolo is a low-sulfite, lightly frizzante red revived from a 1606 recipe, fermented spontaneously with minimal added sulfur.
lowsulfite.tip: The Claré J.C. is a barely-sparkling, low-sulfite Nebbiolo; serve it cold like a chillable light red.

verified.address_quoted: Piazza della Vite e del Vino, 1 - Fraz. Vergne 12060 Barolo

lowsulfite.name: Ferdinando Principiano
lowsulfite.description: Principiano works in a low-intervention, low-sulfite natural style, with whole-cluster ferments and minimal added sulfur across his Dolcetto, Barbera and Barolo range.
lowsulfite.tip: The Dolcetto Sant'Anna is bottled with no added sulfites; ask for it to taste the no-added-sulfur end of the range.
